title: combined conditions on declared table in User Defined Function definition crashes monetdb
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1(id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, value1 INT, value2 DOUBLE, status BOOLEAN);
CREATE TABLE test_table2(id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, ref_id BIGINT, description VARCHAR(255));
SELECT value1 FROM test_table1 WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 2 AND value2 BETWEEN 10.0 AND 30.0;
key_bug_features: combined conditions on declared table in User Defined Function
